privacy.local_addrbook: excluded when local node is not on celestia mainnet
privacy.public_endpoints: POSTHUMAN public RPC, chain-registry RPC/seed/peer entries, and public RPC /net_info peers
privacy.observed_public_peers: globally routable peers returned by public Celestia mainnet RPC /net_info
privacy.note: The map uses only public Celestia mainnet endpoints. Private validator/sentry topology and non-global addresses are intentionally excluded. Local ~/.celestia-app data is ignored unless it is verified to be on chain_id celestia.
